name: Student Records (SIS)
notification_requirements: FERPA: notify parents of any unauthorized disclosure; state ed dept for large breach

name: Student Health / Nurse Records
notification_requirements: Notify parents; consult district counsel on health data
notes: Medication schedules and emergency medical info

name: Staff HR and Payroll
notification_requirements: Notify affected staff within state deadline (typically 30-45 days); AG if over 500

name: Free/Reduced Lunch Applications
notification_requirements: USDA program confidentiality rules; parent notification

name: Staff Account Credentials
notification_requirements: Force password reset on any compromise
notes: Domain logins for all staff systems
